events.summary: D1 Phase 0 (Research) initialized. Research.md authored (12 sections, ~440 lines). 4 candidate sub-features enumerated: D1.a (time-decay + trend), D1.b (cohort priors), D1.c (AI-suggested replacement), D1.d (transparency UX). Recommended v1 pair: D1.a + D1.d (100% on-device, ~3.5 person-days, closes C5.b + C5.e out-of-scope). D1.b/c deferred to v8.0+. 3 new analytics events. Cross-platform tradeoff matrix documented. Phase E compliant. Phase 0 to Phase 1 GATED on operator picking 2 of D1.a/b/c/d.
